findings.description: `BasicApplicationInitializer` is missing from s4 hints. The source defines `nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer` in the XML config example and in the initializer section (c), making it a relevant lookup term for this configuration.
findings.source_evidence: 設定ファイル例 XML: `<component name="initializer" class="nablarch.core.repository.initialization.BasicApplicationInitializer">` and section c) description

findings.description: `FieldAnnotationHandlerSupport` is missing from s4 hints. The source names this class explicitly as the parent class for the annotation handlers in the b)-4 section heading, making it a valid lookup term for finding the BasicStaticDataCache configuration.
findings.source_evidence: Section heading: `FieldAnnotationHandlerSupportのサブクラス(CurrentDateTimeAnnotationHandlerやUserIdAnnotationHandlerなど)から参照されるBasicStaticDataCacheの設定`
